meta.title: The Chinese Communist Party Does Not Represent the Chinese People
meta.description:
Hudson Institute’s China Center presents a new series entitled, “Evening Chats with Mike Pompeo: A Message to the Chinese People.” In this series, seventieth US Secretary of State Michael R. Pompeo speaks directly to the Chinese people about the Chinese Communist Party and US-China relations.

In this first episode, Pompeo explains that despite its rhetoric the Chinese Communist Party is a totalitarian, one-party government that neither represents the Chinese people nor governs in their interests.

Transcript: https://s3.amazonaws.com/media.hudson.org/Episode+1%EF%BC%8C+EnglishChinese+Texts+%E4%B8%AD%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87.pdf

To learn more about Hudson Institute’s China Center, please visit us at https://www.hudson.org/policycenters/48-china-center
